source_note: Numbers sourced from California state rebuilding dashboard, which aggregates official data from each jurisdiction. The City of Los Angeles section reflects Palisades Fire rebuilding within City limits.

milestones.title: Palisades Fire ignites
milestones.detail: Wind-driven fire begins near Temescal Ridge; rapidly spreads through Pacific Palisades, parts of Malibu, and Topanga.

milestones.title: Mayor Bass signs Executive Order 1
milestones.detail: Suspends permit fees; waives discretionary review for like-for-like rebuilds; sets up streamlined LADBS pathway.

milestones.title: First rebuild permit issued
milestones.detail: Day 57 post-fire — roughly twice as fast as the first permits issued after the Camp and Woolsey fires.

milestones.title: One-Stop Rebuilding Center opens
milestones.detail: Permit assistance hub at 1828 W. Sawtelle Blvd. consolidates LADBS, Planning, Bureau of Engineering, and DWP intake.

milestones.title: Debris removal substantially complete
milestones.detail: USACE and contractors finish clearance on nearly all parcels in the City of LA portion of the burn area.

milestones.title: AB 130 and SB 131 signed
milestones.detail: State CEQA reform shortens agency review timelines, expands Permit Streamlining Act, adds near-miss review.

milestones.title: Standard Plan Pilot Program launches
milestones.detail: Library of pre-approved single-family designs — homeowners can skip full plan check by selecting a stock plan.

milestones.title: 1,000-permit milestone
milestones.detail: LADBS crosses 1,000 issued permits in Palisades; ~340 projects confirmed under construction.

milestones.title: LA County dashboard upgraded
milestones.detail: Permitting Progress Dashboard relaunched with color-coded views and parcel-level detail across 12,000+ projects.

milestones.title: One-year anniversary
milestones.detail: Across Palisades and Eaton: 2,600+ residential permits issued, ~13,000 homes lost.

milestones.title: Property tax payment deadline
milestones.detail: Final day for fire-impacted property owners to make payments under the modified assessment program.

resources.name: LADBS Palisades Rebuild Portal
resources.desc: City of LA Department of Building & Safety — hourly-updated permit dashboard

resources.name: LA County Permitting Progress Dashboard
resources.desc: County tracker for both Palisades and Eaton fire zones

resources.name: LA Strong: Return & Rebuild
resources.desc: City of LA recovery hub — debris removal, ROE submissions, final inspections

resources.name: California Rebuilding Dashboard
resources.desc: State-level dashboard covering LA City, LA County, Malibu, and Pasadena

resources.name: Pali Builds
resources.desc: Independent, privately operated rebuild data tracker by local builders

resources.name: Palisadian-Post Rebuild Dashboard
resources.desc: Weekly published dashboard using Pali Builds data
